feed.title: Google Cloud: Google SecOps Marketplace
feed.subtitle: Changelog for Google Cloud product: Google SecOps Marketplace

entry.content:
SentinelOneV2: Version 50.0

  • The following new job has been added:

  • Sync Threats
entry.summary: The SentinelOne V2 integration has been updated to version 50.0. This release introduces a new 'Sync Threats' job, enhancing your threat synchronization capabilities.
entry.title: Feature: New Threat Sync Job Available

entry.content:
CrowdStrike Falcon: Version 76.0

  • The following new job has been added:

  • Sync Alerts
entry.summary: CrowdStrike Falcon version 76.0 is now available. This update introduces a new 'Sync Alerts' job. This enhancement aims to streamline alert management and improve operational efficiency.
entry.title: Feature: CrowdStrike Falcon 76.0 Update

entry.content:
ServiceNow: Version 64.0

  • Added support for disabling overflow settings and updated ticket processing and environment mapping logic in the following connector:

  • ServiceNow Connector
entry.summary: Version 64.0 of the ServiceNow connector is now available. This update includes the ability to disable overflow settings and enhancements to ticket processing and environment mapping logic.
entry.title: Change: ServiceNow Connector Update

entry.content:
Zscaler: Version 14.0

  • Added the ability to provide IOCs using input parameters to the following actions:

  • Add To Blacklist

  • Add To Whitelist
  • Remove From Blacklist
  • Remove From Whitelist
  • Integration: Added support for OAuth authentication.
entry.summary: Zscaler version 14.0 introduces the ability to use input parameters for IOC management in blacklist and whitelist actions. Additionally, it now supports OAuth authentication for enhanced integration.
entry.title: Change: Zscaler Version 14.0 Enhancements

entry.content:
Mandiant Threat Intelligence: Version 17.0

  • Optimized execution performance and entity processing logic in the following action:

  • Enrich Entities
entry.summary: Mandiant Threat Intelligence version 17.0 has been released, featuring optimizations to execution performance and entity processing within the Enrich Entities action. This update aims to improve the efficiency of threat intelligence analysis.
entry.title: Change: Mandiant Threat Intelligence Update 17.0

entry.content:
Gmail: Version 9.0

  • A new predefined widget has been added to the following action:

  • Delete Email
entry.summary: We've added a new predefined widget to the 'Delete Email' action in Gmail version 9.0. This enhancement streamlines the email deletion process for a smoother user experience.
entry.title: Feature: New Gmail Widget for Email Deletion

entry.content:
Tanium: Version 19.0

  • A new predefined widget has been added to the following action:

  • Create Connection
entry.summary: Tanium version 19.0 introduces a new predefined widget for the Create Connection action. This enhancement aims to streamline the connection process for users.
entry.title: Feature: New Tanium Widget Available

entry.content:
Cynet: Version 13.0

  • New predefined widgets have been added to the following actions:

  • Delete Hash In Hosts

  • Kill Hash In Hosts
  • Quarantine Hash In Hosts
entry.summary: Cynet version 13.0 introduces new predefined widgets for hash-related actions, including Delete Hash In Hosts, Kill Hash In Hosts, and Quarantine Hash In Hosts. These additions streamline security operations by providing quick access to relevant information and controls.
entry.title: Feature: Cynet 13.0 Enhancements

entry.content:
Area1: Version 9.0

  • A new predefined widget has been added to the following action:

  • Search Indicator
entry.summary: Version 9.0 introduces a new predefined widget for the Search Indicator action. This enhancement aims to improve user experience and data visualization within the platform.
entry.title: Feature: Search Indicator Widget Added

entry.content:
Azure Active Directory: Version 26.0

  • A new predefined widget has been added to the following action:

  • Is User In a Group
entry.summary: A new widget is now available for the 'Is User In a Group' action in Azure Active Directory, version 26.0. This enhancement simplifies checking user group memberships.
entry.title: Feature: New Azure AD group check

entry.content:
MX ToolBox: Version 14.0

  • A new predefined widget has been added to the following action:

  • SPF Lookup
entry.summary: MX ToolBox version 14.0 introduces a new predefined widget for the SPF Lookup action. This enhancement improves the usability and accessibility of SPF record information within the tool.
entry.title: Feature: MX ToolBox 14.0: New SPF Lookup Widget

entry.content:
Active Directory: Version 41.0

  • New predefined widgets have been added to the following actions:

  • Is User In Group

  • List User Groups
entry.summary: Two new predefined widgets have been added for the 'Is User In Group' and 'List User Groups' actions in Active Directory version 41.0. These widgets enhance the usability and visualization of group membership information.
entry.title: Feature: New widgets for Active Directory actions

entry.content:
Cisco Threat Grid: Version 18.0

  • New predefined widgets have been added to the following actions:

  • Get Hash Associated Domains

  • Get Hash Associated IPs
entry.summary: Cisco Threat Grid version 18.0 introduces new predefined widgets for Hash Associated Domains and Hash Associated IPs actions. This update enhances the usability and data visualization capabilities within the platform.
entry.title: Feature: New Widgets in Threat Grid

entry.content:
Google Chronicle: Version 81.0

  • The following new action has been added:

  • Is CIDR In Data Table
entry.summary: Version 81.0 of Google Chronicle introduces a new 'Is CIDR In Data Table' action. This feature enhances security analysis by allowing users to easily check if IP addresses fall within specified CIDR ranges within their data tables.
entry.title: Feature: New CIDR detection feature

entry.content:
Endgame: Version 15.0

  • New predefined widgets have been added to the following actions:

  • Collect Autoruns

  • Drivers Survey (Windows only)
  • Firewall Survey (Windows only)
  • Process Survey
  • Removable Media Survey (Windows only)
  • Software Survey (Windows only)
  • User Sessions Survey
entry.summary: Version 15.0 introduces new predefined widgets for several endpoint actions, including Autoruns, Drivers Survey, Firewall Survey, Process Survey, Removable Media Survey, Software Survey, and User Sessions Survey. These widgets provide enhanced visibility into your endpoints, making it easier to monitor and manage critical security information.
entry.title: Feature: New widgets for enhanced endpoint visibility

entry.content:

entry.summary: AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) version 10.0 introduces a new predefined widget for the Disable User Access action. This enhancement simplifies the process of managing user access permissions within the IAM console.
entry.title: Feature: IAM: New widget for disabling user access

Exchange: Version 123.0

  • Introduced light theme support for predefined widgets of the following actions:

  • Get Account Out Of Facility Settings

  • Send Email And Wait

entry.content:
Microsoft Defender ATP: Version 31.0

  • Added Graph API V2 version support to the following actions:

  • Get User Related Alerts

  • List Alerts
  • Ping
  • Update Alert

  • Deprecated the following actions:

  • Get File Related Alerts

  • Get Machine Related Alerts
  • Added Graph API V2 version support to the following connector:

(REGRESSIVE) The connector must be updated by April 10, 2026.

Note: You must update ontology mapping. Alerts created with the new API have a different structure and require additional permissions. We recommend using Microsoft 365 Defender - Incidents Connector as a replacement. + Microsoft Defender ATP Connector V2 * Introduced light theme support for predefined widgets of the following actions:

  • Enrich Entities
  • Execute Live Response Command
  • Get File Related Alerts
  • Get File Related Machines
  • Get Machine Logon Users
  • Get Machine Recommendations
  • Get Machine Related Alerts
  • Get Machine Vulnerabilities
  • Get User Related Alerts
entry.summary: Version 31.0 of Microsoft Defender ATP introduces Graph API V2 support for several actions, deprecates older actions, and adds light theme support to predefined widgets. The Microsoft Defender ATP Connector V2 requires an update by April 10, 2026, with Microsoft 365 Defender - Incidents Connector recommended as a replacement.
entry.title: Change: Microsoft Defender ATP Update

entry.title: Change: AMP: New Light Theme for Widgets

Azure Active Directory: Version 19.0

  • Improved performance by implementing a direct API filter query for group name searches, which avoids fetching all groups and significantly reduces execution time in large-group environments, in the following action:

  • List Members in Group
entry.summary: Version 19.0 of Azure Active Directory introduces a performance enhancement for the List Members in Group action. By implementing a direct API filter query for group name searches, it now avoids fetching all groups, leading to significantly reduced execution times, especially in environments with large numbers of groups.
entry.title: Changed: Azure Active Directory v19.0 Update

  • Update Case Description

entry.content:
Refactored the code to work with updated API in the following integrations:

  • Case Federation: Version 3.0
  • Siemplify: Version 91.0

entry.title: Changed: Code refactored for updated APIs

entry.content:
Microsoft Azure Sentinel: Version 54.0

  • Added an ability to not process the alert until Scheduled/NRT alert objects are available from API in the following connectors:

  • Microsoft Azure Sentinel - Incident Connector v2

  • Microsoft Azure Sentinel - Incident Tracking Connector
entry.summary: The Microsoft Azure Sentinel has been updated to version 54.0. This update includes an enhancement to the Incident Connector v2 and Incident Tracking Connector, allowing them to avoid processing alerts until the necessary Scheduled/NRT alert objects are available from the API.
entry.title: Changed: Azure Sentinel Update to Version 54.0

entry.content:

entry.title: Changed: SentinelOneV2 Update to Version 39.0

entry.content:
Refactored the code to work with updated API in the following integrations:

  • ServiceNow: Version 57.0
  • Microsoft Graph Mail Delegated: Version 5.0

Refactored the code in the following integrations:

  • Gmail: Version 4.0
  • Google Cloud API: Version 6.0
  • HTTP v2: Version 9.0
  • Microsoft Graph Mail: Version 28.0
  • Tor: Version 7.0

entry.title: Changed: Code refactoring for updated API integrations
